allow: PowerShell(if \(-not \(Test-Path docs\\decisions\)\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path docs\\decisions -Force | Out-Null }; Get-ChildItem docs\\decisions -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name)
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker compose run --rm --entrypoint /bin/sh wpcli -c "mariadb-check --print-defaults 2>&1; echo '---'; ls -la /etc/my.cnf* /etc/my.cnf.d/ /etc/mysql/ 2>&1")
